title: Fate/strange Fake Novels' Final Volume Ships This Summer
content: Image via Amazon© Ryohgo Narita, Type-Moon, KadokawaThe official X/Twitter account for Kadokawa's Dengeki Bunko label announced on Sunday that the 10th and final volume of Ryohgo Narita's Fate/strange Fake spinoff novels will debut this summer.
author: ANN

title: MAPPA CEO Opens Up on Past Fears of Going Bankrupt, Failures, Yuri on ICE, and Chainsaw Man Solo Funding
content: Manabu Otsuka, the CEO and president of anime studio MAPPA, penned a feature for Bungeishunju (Bunshun) Plus, where he discussed the studio’s past, present, and future, including its successes and failures. Otsuka left Studio 4°C in 2011 to join MAPPA as it was being founded.
author: Anime Corner

title: Oshi no Ko Reveals Ruby Hoshino Entertainment Work Visual
content: Strawberry Production’s Ruby Hoshino has taken on the role of dress advertisement model for the dress brand “KIYOKO HATA” and Oshi no Ko revealed an entertainment work visual on Monday.
author: Anime Corner

title: Manga Creator Rakko Dies Due to Heart Failure
content: The official X/Twitter account of manga creator and illustrator Rakko revealed on March 27 that Rakko died on March 20 due to heart failure. Rakko's brother made the announcement.
author: ANN

title: Anime Central Hosts 765PRO, Cinderella Girls Idols from The Idolm@ster
content: The Anime Central convention and Bandai Namco Entertainment announced on March 25 that the convention will host six idols from The IDOLM@STER franchise, including: Asami Imai (Chihaya Kisaragi), Akiko Hasegawa (Miki Hoshii), and Yumi Hara (Takane Shijou) from 765PRO ALL STARS; and Ayaka Fukuhara (Rin Shibuya), Ayaka…
author: ANN

title: Yaiba: Samurai Legend Season 2 Unveils Teaser Visual
content: The staff for Yaiba: Samurai Legend (Shin Samurai-den YAIBA), the new television anime of Detective Conan creator Gōshō Aoyama's Yaiba manga, unveiled a new teaser visual for the second season at Sho-Pro's AnimeJapan 2026 booth on Saturday.
author: ANN

title: Disney Twisted-Wonderland Game Casts Shōgo Sakamoto, Ryōta Ōsaka
content: The stage panel for the Disney Twisted-Wonderland game announced cast members for the title's two newest characters at the AnimeJapan 2026 convention's Aniplex booth on Sunday. The two characters are from The Royal Sword Academy, the long-discussed but little-detailed rival of Night Raven College (the primary setting…
author: ANN

title: Theatre of Darkness: Yamishibai 16 - Episode 12 - Restoration
content: This is the story of of a man who was given possession of a certain doll.
author: Crunchyroll

title: 'Gintama' Creator Hideaki Sorachi Begins New Manga in April 2026
content: The 18th issue of Weekly Shounen Jump magazine announced that a new manga by Hideaki Sorachi , 2-nen B-gumi Yuusha Destroyers ( Hero Destroyers of Class 2B ), will begin in the 21st issue on April 20. This marks Sorachi's first serialization in seven years after the end of Gintama in 2019.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Sony Aath Airs Jujutsu Kaisen Anime's 1st Season with Bengali Dub on April 3
content: ©芥見下々／集英社・呪術廻戦製作委員会The 'Sony Aath' television channel is streaming promotional videos for the first season of Jujutsu Kaisen. The channel will begin airing the anime with a Bengali dub on April 3 and will air an episode every weekday at 5:00 p.m.
author: ANN
